text:
- Update to 4.5.3
- From http://wiki.typo3.org/TYPO3_4.5.3:
[...]"a new packaging system was developed"[...]
As a result I had to more or less completely rewrite the Makefile. I tried to cover all
eventualities but I advice all users to have a very recent backup just in case.
